title: Effect of Closure Order. All officers and responsible employees/agents of
content: 1 the entity engaged in the illegal recruitment activity shall be ordered included in the 2 blacklist of persons involved in illegal recruitment and trafficking of seafarers and the List 3 of Persons with Derogatory Record, and shall be disqualified from participating in the 4 overseas employment program of the government. 5 6
